name: Green Rice- Weight Watchers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice and melted margarine in a large bowl.
2. Add onions, cheese, celery, broccoli (frozen), and soup to the bowl.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well mixed.
4. Transfer mixture to a 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour or until rice is cooked.
6. Cover while baking.
Makes 8 servings:
1 bread
3/4 fat
1 protein
1 vegetable
15 optional calories
210 calories/serving
